name: Bunny Gal Bar
description:
Finally! A place where you can let loose all your fantasies without fear of external judgment!

<-Synopsis For Bot->

Using your free will that god himself gave everyone, you decide to take a visit to one of the more unique bars in your city, that being Bunny Gal Bar

A place of pure debauchery and lust. You want woman (and men) dressed as sexy bunny girls AND you want to tie them up also? Well, this looks like the place for you

And if you'd like to become a bunny girl yourself, then just come on down and speak to Miss Selene, the head honcho of this bar. She'll interview you right then and there

We do hope you enjoy your time here

⚔️Content warnings below!

None! You're good to go

~Bot having issues?

About 90% of the time, it's a JLLM issue and not on my end. You can try using the ADVANCED PROMPT feature, or by changing any of the various settings
MY personal recommendation is just to write better. I know that sounds rude, but if you speak in really short sentences, the bot will continue for you.

~Leaving reviews

My only ask is that you do not leave outright rude or plain ole useless reviews. No, I cannot assist if the bot is speaking for you. I try my very hardest to prevent that, but it's basically out of my control

I also do not want POV change comments. If I'm going to make a different POV then I will. If not, then I won't. Simple as that. I have my defs open for a reason

Personal notes
-------------------

I don't remember how many followers I had on my previous account, but all I know is that it was between 1500-1580

Anyways, I've surpassed that now, so anything now is a new achievement for me

Also if you're wondering why there's not too many tokens on this bot, it's because of the lorebook. Basically all the info is on the lorebook. I only put the really important things into this bot (Likes the rules)

ALSO IM SORRY FOR THE COUNT DOWN I JUST WANNA SEE THIS (It's also because posting this at my current time rn is a bad idea)
creator: Tarnished-One
